source.focus: camera movement, text animation, menu/panel animation
notes: Runtime inspection uses Vue component refs exposed by the public SPA.
Scene.enterClick() was invoked through Vue because the loader flag kept the DOM button hidden in headless Chromium.
Camera intro/free samples were triggered against the page runtime; source timing summary is from beautified public JS/CSS.

introCss.contentLetters: opacity transition, 2s duration, 0.2s base delay plus per-letter inline delays
introCss.enterRedLetters: opacity transition with staggered delays from 2.0s to 2.4s on intro enter
introCss.enterIcon: red vertical bar scaleY over 1s after 2.5s; red horizontal bar scaleX over 1s after 3.3s
introCss.leave: letters/logo fade out over 0.6s with 0-0.4s stagger; bars collapse over 0.6s

hoverCtaCss.mainMenuCta: hover swaps bottom underline scaleX with left vertical scaleY; letters translateX(50%) over 0.3s with stagger
hoverCtaCss.enterButton: red letters fade out and black letters fade in over 0.45s; black bars scale in after red bars scale out

cameraSource.intro: position tween 3s from introPositionStart to introPositionEnd; rotation tween 3s power1.inOut
cameraSource.focus: target camera position and rotation tween 2s power2.inOut; y target gets sinusoidal +0.2 arc during tween
cameraSource.free: floating amplitude and camera easing ramp over configurable duration with power2.in
cameraSource.perFrame: position/rotation ease toward target by easing.value * time.delta; mousemove updates floating target; drag delta pans/tilts/free-moves

panelSource.scrollPanelExtended: bars material bounding grows from small scroll mark to full vertical panel over 2s power4.inOut; secondary progress bar follows with 1s delay
panelSource.scrollPanelLeave: panel collapses back over 2.5s power4.out; underline collapse uses 0.8s power4.inOut
panelSource.shaderReveal: uRevealProgress feeds Perlin/random grid reveal in fragment shaders for text/panels
